package.name: handpose_estimation_v2
package.description: Model-based 3D hand pose estimation (v2). Replaces per-joint triangulation + 3D Procrustes (stages A + C of handpose_estimation) with a direct multi-view rigid fit: the 21-landmark hand template's 6-DoF pose is estimated by minimising robust 2D reprojection error in all views simultaneously, so the template's bone lengths constrain depth inside the optimisation. Stages B1/D/E are reused from handpose_estimation.
